title: WALNUT PARK SHELTER - 211info
text: WALNUT PARK SHELTER WALNUT PARK SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a low-barrier shelter. Residents will have access to coffee, tea, books, and board games. Bathrooms, showers, and laundry onsite are available for program participants. Beds at a shelter are not guaranteed. 5329 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Age 18 and older, with priority for individuals age 55 and older, adults with disabilities, and veterans Hours: Shelter: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Resource Center (in person or phone): Monday-Friday 8:30am-7pm, Saturday/Sunday/all holidays 8:30am-3pm; service intakes end 15 minutes before close (503) 280-4700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 488-7762 Shelter Main phone (503) 280-4700 INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Visit website to submit a Shelter Access Pre-Screening Form, or walk in or call the Resource Center (650 NW Irving Street) to sign up for a shelter bed. A team member responds to all submissions to gather more information. -Reservations only and no intake at the shelter's physical location; without a reservation, people will be turned away. Once a space is reserved, the guest may continue to use the space until they no longer need it. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of Killingsworth Street and MLK Boulevard Services: Community Shelters * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Community Shelters * Homeless Veterans Community Shelters * Older Adults If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WALNUT PARK SHELTER
